requirements.name: Applicable Module Identified
requirements.description: The DPA must identify which SCC module applies: Module 1 (controller-to-controller), Module 2 (controller-to-processor), Module 3 (processor-to-processor), or Module 4 (processor-to-controller).
expected_provisions: Applicable SCC module explicitly identified
Roles of the parties (exporter/importer, controller/processor) specified
SCCs incorporated by reference or appended in full

requirements.name: Purpose Limitation and Instructions
requirements.description: The data importer shall process personal data only on documented instructions from the data exporter, and only for the specific purposes of the transfer as set out in Annex I.B.
expected_provisions: Processing only on documented instructions from exporter
Specific purposes of transfer described in Annex I.B or equivalent schedule
Importer informs exporter if unable to follow instructions

requirements.name: Annex I — Parties, Transfer Details, Competent Authority
requirements.article_reference: SCC Annex I (Parts A, B, C)
requirements.description: Annex I must identify the parties (I.A), describe the transfer (I.B — categories of data subjects, personal data, sensitive data, frequency, nature, purpose, retention period), and identify the competent supervisory authority (I.C).
expected_provisions: Parties identified with name, address, contact, activities, role
Categories of data subjects described
Categories of personal data transferred described
Sensitive data identified (if applicable) with restrictions
Frequency and nature of processing described
Purpose of transfer stated
Retention period or criteria for determining retention
Competent supervisory authority identified

requirements.name: Annex II — Technical and Organisational Measures
requirements.description: The data importer must describe the specific technical and organisational security measures implemented to protect personal data.
expected_provisions: Technical measures described (encryption, pseudonymization, access controls)
Organisational measures described (personnel training, incident response, testing)
Measures appropriate to the risk of the processing

requirements.name: Sub-Processor Authorization and Flow-Down
requirements.description: The data importer shall not sub-contract processing without prior specific or general written authorisation from the data exporter, and shall impose the same data protection obligations on the sub-processor.
expected_provisions: Prior written authorization for sub-processing (specific or general with notification)
Sub-processor contract imposes same obligations as SCCs
List of sub-processors provided
Exporter's right to object to new sub-processors
Importer remains fully liable for sub-processor's obligations

requirements.name: Data Subject Rights and Redress
requirements.description: The data importer shall deal with enquiries and requests from data subjects and cooperate with the competent supervisory authority. Data subjects must be able to invoke the SCCs as third-party beneficiaries.
expected_provisions: Data subjects can invoke SCCs as third-party beneficiaries
Importer deals promptly with data subject requests
Importer cooperates with supervisory authorities
Complaint handling process described

requirements.name: Data Breach Notification
requirements.description: In the event of a personal data breach, the data importer shall notify the data exporter without undue delay and take reasonable steps to mitigate the effects.
expected_provisions: Notification of data breach without undue delay
Notification includes nature of breach, contact point, consequences, and mitigation measures
Importer cooperates with exporter to address the breach
Importer assists exporter in notifying supervisory authority and data subjects where required

requirements.name: Transfer Impact Assessment
requirements.description: The parties must warrant that they have no reason to believe that the laws and practices of the destination country prevent the data importer from fulfilling its obligations under the SCCs, taking into account supplementary measures.
expected_provisions: Transfer impact assessment conducted or referenced
Parties represent no reason to believe local laws prevent compliance
Relevant local laws and practices of destination country assessed
Supplementary measures identified and implemented where necessary

requirements.name: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
requirements.description: The SCCs must specify the governing law (must be the law of an EU Member State) and the forum for dispute resolution.
expected_provisions: Governing law specified (must be law of an EU Member State)
Forum for disputes specified (courts of an EU Member State)
Data subjects may bring proceedings in Member State of habitual residence

requirements.name: Docking Clause (Optional)
requirements.description: The optional docking clause allows additional parties to accede to the SCCs as data exporters or importers by completing and signing Annex I.A.
expected_provisions: Docking clause included or excluded with clear statement
If included, process for additional parties to accede is described
